name: Narendra Modi
text: Narendra Modi: 14th and current Prime Minister of India since 2014. Previously Chief Minister of Gujarat. Focus areas: Digital India, Swachh Bharat, Atmanirbhar Bharat, and infrastructure development.

name: Amit Shah
text: Amit Shah: Current Minister of Home Affairs and Minister of Co-operation. Key roles: Internal security, border management, and legislative reforms like Article 370 abrogation.

name: S. Jaishankar
text: Subrahmanyam Jaishankar: Minister of External Affairs. Former Foreign Secretary. Focus: Indian diplomacy, global strategic partnerships, and 'India First' foreign policy.

name: Nirmala Sitharaman
text: Nirmala Sitharaman: Minister of Finance and Corporate Affairs. Previously Defense Minister. Managing Union Budgets, GST reforms, and economic growth strategies.

name: Rajnath Singh
text: Rajnath Singh: Current Minister of Defence. Former Home Minister and BJP President. Focus: Modernization of armed forces and 'Make in India' in defence.

name: Yogi Adityanath
text: Yogi Adityanath: 22nd and current Chief Minister of Uttar Pradesh since 2017. Known for law and order focus and development projects in UP.

name: Rahul Gandhi
text: Rahul Gandhi: Member of Parliament and current Leader of Opposition in the 18th Lok Sabha. Former Congress President. Prominent opposition voice.

name: Mallikarjun Kharge
text: Mallikarjun Kharge: Current President of the Indian National Congress. Leader of Opposition in Rajya Sabha. Long-standing parliamentary career.

name: Arvind Kejriwal
text: Arvind Kejriwal: National Convener of AAP. Served as Chief Minister of Delhi. Focus areas: Mohalla Clinics, education reforms, and free electricity/water models.

name: Mamata Banerjee
text: Mamata Banerjee: 8th and current Chief Minister of West Bengal since 2011. Founder of TMC. Key focus: Social welfare schemes like Kanyashree.

name: M. K. Stalin
text: M. K. Stalin: 8th and current Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu. President of DMK. Focus: Dravidian model of governance and social justice.

name: C. Rajagopalachari
text: C. Rajagopalachari (Rajaji): Last Governor-General of India, first Indian-born. Bharat Ratna recipient. Chief Minister of Madras. Founded Swatantra Party (Free Market focus).

name: B. R. Ambedkar
text: B. R. Ambedkar: Architect of the Indian Constitution. First Law Minister. Social reformer who fought against caste discrimination.

name: Jawaharlal Nehru
text: Jawaharlal Nehru: First Prime Minister of India (1947-1964). Central figure in the independence movement. Architect of modern Indian nation-state.
